evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-1: Anticoagulation Missing in Mechanical Valve
gapsPushIds: Warfarin not active with mechanical valve
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-1

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-2: Echo Surveillance for Bioprosthetic Valve
gapsPushIds: Echo surveillance overdue for bioprosthetic valve
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-2

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-3: INR Monitoring for Mechanical Valve
gapsPushIds: INR monitoring overdue for mechanical valve on warfarin
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-3

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-4: Mitral Stenosis Surveillance
gapsPushIds: Echo surveillance overdue for mitral stenosis
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-4

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-103: Severe chronic asymptomatic AR with LV dysfunction -> surgical evaluation (AUDIT-134 tightened)
gapsPushIds: Severe asymptomatic AR with LV dysfunction: surgical evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-103

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-102: Moderate aortic regurgitation without surveillance echo
gapsPushIds: Aortic regurgitation without surveillance echo on file
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-102

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-104: Mixed / multi-valve disease without integrated staging
gapsPushIds: Mixed / multi-valve disease without integrated severity staging
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-104

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-105: Moderate MR graded by color Doppler without quantitative triangulation
gapsPushIds: Moderate MR by color Doppler without quantitative (EROA/vena-contracta) triangulation
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-105

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-068: Mechanical prosthetic valve + elevated gradient -> thrombosis (PVT) workup
gapsPushIds: Mechanical prosthetic valve with elevated gradient: thrombosis (PVT) workup gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-068

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-011: Bioprosthetic valve + elevated gradient -> structural valve deterioration (SVD) evaluation
gapsPushIds: Bioprosthetic valve with elevated gradient: structural deterioration (SVD) evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-011

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-001: Mechanical valve on warfarin with sub-therapeutic INR (AUDIT-133 / post slug-fix)
gapsPushIds: Mechanical valve with sub-therapeutic INR: warfarin management gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-001

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-006: Mechanical valve + atherosclerotic disease without low-dose ASA adjunct
gapsPushIds: Mechanical valve with atherosclerotic disease without low-dose ASA adjunct
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-006

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-057: Infective endocarditis + heart failure -> urgent surgery indication
gapsPushIds: Infective endocarditis with heart failure: urgent surgery indication gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-057

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-059: Infective endocarditis + embolic event on anticoagulation -> surgery consideration
gapsPushIds: Infective endocarditis with embolic event on therapy: surgery consideration gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-059

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-060: Infective endocarditis + large mobile vegetation (>10 mm), no prior embolic event -> early-surgery
gapsPushIds: Infective endocarditis with large mobile vegetation (>10 mm): early-surgery consideration gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-060

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-064: Prior infective endocarditis + dental procedure without antibiotic prophylaxis
gapsPushIds: Prior infective endocarditis: dental antibiotic prophylaxis gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-064

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-079: Rheumatic heart disease without benzathine penicillin secondary prophylaxis
gapsPushIds: Rheumatic heart disease without benzathine penicillin secondary prophylaxis
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-079

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-083: Rheumatic heart disease + AF not on warfarin -> anticoagulation (warfarin, DOAC contraindicated)
gapsPushIds: Rheumatic heart disease + atrial fibrillation not on warfarin (DOAC contraindicated)
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-083

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-098: Mechanical valve + reproductive-age female, not pregnant -> pre-conception counseling
gapsPushIds: Mechanical valve in a reproductive-age patient: pre-conception anticoagulation counseling gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-098

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-099: Mechanical valve + pregnancy -> anticoagulation SAFETY management (Tier-S)
gapsPushIds: Mechanical valve in pregnancy: anticoagulation strategy SAFETY review (teratogenicity vs valve-thrombosis tradeoff)
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-099

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-100: Mechanical valve + pregnancy + on LMWH with anti-Xa NOT in the therapeutic peak range (0.8-1.2
gapsPushIds: Mechanical valve in pregnancy on LMWH: anti-Xa out of therapeutic range (0.8-1.2 U/mL) dose adjustment gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-100

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-091: Dopamine agonist (cabergoline / pergolide) -> drug-induced valve surveillance echo
gapsPushIds: Ergot-derived dopamine agonist therapy: drug-induced valve disease surveillance echo gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-091

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VHD-092: Ergotamine / methysergide -> drug-induced valve surveillance echo
gapsPushIds: Chronic ergot-alkaloid therapy: drug-induced valve disease surveillance echo gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: VHD-092

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-6: DOAC Contraindicated in Mechanical Valve
gapsPushIds: DOAC detected in mechanical valve patient -- contraindicated
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-6

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-7 RETIRED to SPEC_ONLY (AUDIT-194 Part A, 2026-06-30). Gated on AS dx + age>65 only, with NO
gapsPushIds: Rheumatic heart disease screening recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-7

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-8: Rheumatic Heart Disease Screen
gapsPushIds: Rheumatic heart disease screening recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-8

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-9: Endocarditis Education
gapsPushIds: Endocarditis education documentation recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-9

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-10: Pregnancy Risk in Valve Disease
gapsPushIds: Pregnancy risk assessment recommended for review in valve disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-10

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-11: Bioprosthetic Valve Degeneration Watch
gapsPushIds: Bioprosthetic valve degeneration monitoring recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-11

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-12: Anticoagulation in AF + Valve Disease
gapsPushIds: Oral anticoagulation missing in AF with valve disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-12

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-13: Anticoagulation First 3 Months Post-Bioprosthetic
gapsPushIds: Anticoagulation/antiplatelet not documented in early post-bioprosthetic valve period
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-13

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-14: Dental Prophylaxis in High-Risk Valve
gapsPushIds: Dental prophylaxis antibiotic recommended for review in prosthetic valve patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-14

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-15: Aortic Root Dilation Monitoring
gapsPushIds: Aortic root dilation monitoring recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-15

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-16: Mixed Valve Disease Assessment
gapsPushIds: Hemolysis monitoring recommended for review in prosthetic valve with anemia
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-16

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-16 RETIRED to SPEC_ONLY (AUDIT-194 Part A, 2026-06-30). Gated on bare I35.2 (mixed aortic valve)
gapsPushIds: Hemolysis monitoring recommended for review in prosthetic valve with anemia
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-16

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-17: Hemolysis Monitoring Post-Valve
gapsPushIds: Hemolysis monitoring recommended for review in prosthetic valve with anemia
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-17

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap VD-18: Exercise Testing in Asymptomatic Severe Valve Disease
gapsPushIds: Exercise testing recommended for review in asymptomatic severe valve disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-18

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-PANNUS: Prosthetic Valve Pannus/Thrombosis Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider pannus vs thrombosis evaluation for prosthetic valve with new symptoms
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-PANNUS

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-RADIATION: Radiation-Associated Valve Disease
gapsPushIds: Consider radiation-associated valve disease evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-RADIATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-ENDOCARDITIS-SURV: Infective Endocarditis Surveillance
gapsPushIds: Consider infective endocarditis evaluation for prosthetic valve patient with fever
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-ENDOCARDITIS-SURV

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-BICUSPID-AORTOPATHY: Bicuspid Valve Aortopathy Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider aortic surveillance for bicuspid valve-associated aortopathy
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-BICUSPID-AORTOPATHY

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-ANTICOAG-REVERSAL: Anticoagulation Reversal Emergency Plan
gapsPushIds: Consider anticoagulation reversal emergency plan documentation for mechanical valve
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-ANTICOAG-REVERSAL

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-TRANSCATHETER-MV: Transcatheter Mitral Intervention Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider transcatheter mitral valve intervention evaluation for high-risk MR patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-TRANSCATHETER-MV

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-RHC: Right Heart Catheterization for Valve + PH
gapsPushIds: Consider right heart catheterization for valve disease with pulmonary hypertension
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-RHC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-VALVE-CLINIC: Multidisciplinary Valve Clinic Referral
gapsPushIds: Consider multidisciplinary valve clinic referral for symptomatic valve disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-VALVE-CLINIC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-ECHO-INTERVAL: Echocardiographic surveillance interval adherence (registry gap-vd-echo-interval).
gapsPushIds: Surveillance echocardiography overdue in valvular heart disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-ECHO-INTERVAL

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-TRICUSPID-SECONDARY: Secondary Tricuspid Regurgitation
gapsPushIds: Consider secondary tricuspid regurgitation assessment in left heart disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-TRICUSPID-SECONDARY

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // VD-ANTIPLATELET-BIOPROSTHETIC: Antiplatelet After Bioprosthetic Valve >3 Months
gapsPushIds: Consider low-dose aspirin for bioprosthetic valve >3 months post-implant
evaluatorBlocks.name: VD-ANTIPLATELET-BIOPROSTHETIC
